block.header: =N(" sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to nori tamapa ku kake maku mo kasikwo ki nipi kwi no opo miya ni ame no sita wosame tamapi si naka tu sumyera mikoto no omi tati wo myesi te noti no opo mikoto ni nori tamapi siku ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,0@天皇我御命良麻止詔久挂麻久毛畏岐,*

block.header: =N(" imasi tati wo myesi turu koto pa mikadwo ni tukape matu ra mu sama wosipe tamapi noritamapa mu to so myesi turu ")
=N(" odapi ni paberi te moro moro kiki tamapeyo ")
=N(" tadasi ku akiraka ni kiywo ki kokoro wo moti te wa ga kwo sumyera mikoto ni tukape matu ri mamori tasuke mature ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,3@朕子天皇仁奉侍利護助麻都礼,*

block.header: =N(" tugi te pa ko no pi tugi no mi kwo wo tasuke tukape matu re ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@継天方是太子乎助奉侍礼,*

block.header: =N(" wa ga wosipe tama pu mikoto ni sitagapa zu site opo kimi tati pa ono ga u masizi ki mikadwo no taputwo ki mi kurawi wo nozomi moto me pito wo izana pi asi ku kitana ki kokoro wo moti te sakasima ni aru pakari koto wo tate omi tati pa ono ga piki biki kore ni tuki kare ni yori tutu katakuna ni wiya na ki kokoro wo omopi te yokosima no pakari koto wo kamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,10@臣等方己我比伎婢企是尔託,*

block.header: =N(" kaku ara mu pito domo woba ware kanarazu ama gakeri tamapi te mi sonapa si sirizoke tama pi sute tama pi kira pi tamapa mu mono so ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP,NP,1@人等乎波朕必天翔給天見行之退給比捨給比岐良比給牟,*

block.header: =N(" ame tuti no sakipapi mo kagapura zi ")
=N(" kaku no sama siri te akiraka ni kiywo ki kokoro wo moti te tukape matura mu pito woba utukusibwi tama pi aparemi tamapi te wosame tamapa mu mono so ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP,NP,3@人乎波慈給比愍給天治給牟,*

block.header: =N(" mata ame no sakipapi mo kagapu ri naga ki yo ni kadwo taye zu tukape matu ri sakaye mu ")
=N(" koko siri te tutusi mari kiywo ki kokoro wo moti te tukape mature to nori tamapa mu to namo myesi turu to nori tama pi opose tama pu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu ")

=N(" mata nori tamapa ku kake maku mo kasikwo ki wa ga ame no mikadwo sumyera ga opo mikoto moti te nori tamapi si ku ware ni tukape matura mu moro moro no omi tati ware wo kimi to omopa mu pito pa opo kisaki ni yo ku tukape matu re ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-GEN,NP,2@朕我天乃御門帝皇我御命以天勅之久朕尔奉侍牟,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV;@5,PP-TOP,NP,4@人方太皇后仁能奉侍礼,*

block.header: =N(" ware wo omopi te aru ga goto ku koto ni na omopi ")
=N(" tugi te pa wa ga kwo pi tugi no mi kwo ni akiraka ni kiywo ku puta gokoro na ku site tukape matu re ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@継天方朕子太子尔明仁浄久,*

block.header: =N(" ware pa kwo puta ri to ipu koto pa na si ")
=N(" tada ko no pi tugi no mi kwo pito ri nomwi so wa ga kwo pa aru ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@唯此太子一人乃味曾朕我子波在,*

block.header: =N(" ko no kokoro siri te moro moro mamori tasuke tukape matu re ")

=N(" sikaraba ware pa mi mwi tukarasi ku opomasi masu ni yorite pi tugi no mi kwo ni ama tu pi tugi taka mi kura no tugi te pa saduke maturu to nori tamapi te ware ni nori tamapi si ku ame no sita no maturi goto pa utukusibwi wo moti te wosame yo ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@朕波御身都可良之久於保麻之麻湏尔依天,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,2@太子尔天都日嗣高御座乃継天方授麻都流止命天,*
IP-MAT,3@朕尔勅之久天下乃政事波慈乎以天治与,*

block.header: =N(" mata kami pa samu bou no mi nori wo sakaye sime ipye de se si pito wo wosame matu ri tugi pa moro moro no ama tu kamwi kuni tu kamwi no maturi wo tata zu simo pa ame no sita no opo mi takara wo aparemi tama pye ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@復上波三宝乃御法乎隆之米,*
IP-MAT,3@次波諸天神地祇乃祭祀乎不絶下波天下乃諸人民乎愍給弊,*

block.header: =N(" mata nori tamapa si ku ko no mikadwo no kurawi to ipu mono pa ame no saduke tamapa nu pito ni saduke te pa tamotu koto mo e zu mata kapyeri te mwi mo porobwi nuru mono so ")
=N(" wa ga tate te aru pito to ipu tomo mimasi ga kokoro ni yo kara zu to siri me ni mi te mu pito woba aratame te tate mu koto pa kokoro no mani ma seyo to nori tamapi ki ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,PP-TOP,NP,6@事方心乃麻而麻世与止命伎,*

block.header: =N(" mata nori tamapi si ku wa ga aduma bito ni tati wo saduke te pabera simuru koto pa mimasi no tika ki mamori to site mamora simeyo to omopi te namo aru ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@朕我東人尔授刀天侍之牟留,*

block.header: =N(" ko no aduma bito pa tune ni ipa ku pitapi ni pa ya pa tatu tomo se pa ya pa tatazi to ipi te kimi wo pito tu kokoro wo moti te mamoru mono so ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@是東人波常尔云久額尔方箭波立止毛,*

block.header: =N(" ko no kokoro siri te mimasi tukapye to nori tama pi si opo mikoto wo wasure zu ")
=N(" kaku no sama satori te moro moro no aduma kuni no pito domo tutu simari tukape matu re ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@諸東国乃人等謹之末利奉侍礼,*

block.header: =N(" sikaru ni kake maku mo kasikwo ki puta tokoro no sumyera ga opo mikoto wo wa ga itadaki ni uke tamapari te piru mo yworu mo omoposi moti te are domo yosi na ku site pito ni ipi kika simuru koto e zu napo ari ki ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,NP;@3,IP-REL,PP,NP,PP-GEN,NP,1@二所乃天皇我御命乎朕我頂尔受賜天,*
IP-MAT,NP;@3,IP-REL,IP-ADV,2@昼毛夜毛念持天在止毛,*

block.header: =N(" kore ni yori te moro moro no pito ni kika sime mu to namo myesi turu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@此尔依天諸乃人尔令聞止奈毛召都留,*

block.header: =N(" kare koko wo motite ima wa ga imasi tati wo wosipe tamapa mu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@故是以今朕我汝等乎教給牟,*

block.header: =N(" sore kimi no kurawi pa negapi motomuru wo moti te uru koto pa ito kata si to ipu koto woba mwina siri te are domo saki no pito pa pakari goto wodina si ware pa yo ku tuyo ku pakari te kanarazu e te mu to omopi te kusa gusa ni negapi inore domo napo syosyau ama tu kamwi kuni tu kamwi no mi tama no yurusi tamapa zu saduke tamapa nu mono ni are ba ono dukara ni pito mo mawosi arapasi ono ga kuti wo moti te mo ipi tutu kapyeri te mwi wo porobosi wazapapi wo kagapuri te tupi ni tumi wo onore mo pito mo onazi ku itasi tu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@夫君乃位波願求乎以天得,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,7@猶諸聖天神地祇御霊乃不免給不授給,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,8@物尔在波自然尔人毛申顕,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV;@6,12@終尔罪乎己毛他毛同久致都,*

block.header: =N(" kore ni yori te ame tuti wo urami kimi omi wo mo urami nu ")
=N(" napo kokoro wo aratame te napo ku kiywo ku ara ba ame tuti mo nikumi tamapa zu kimi mo sute tamapa zu site sakipapi wo kagapuri mwi mo yasu kye mu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@猶心乎改天直久浄久在波,*

block.header: =N(" iki te pa tukasa kurawi wo tamapa ri sakaye sini te pa yo ki na wo topo ki yo ni nagasi tutape te mu ")

=N(" ko no yuwe ni saki no sakasi ki pito ipi te ara ku mwi pa papi to tomo ni tuti ni udumo ri nuredo na pa keburi to tomo ni ame ni noboru to ip ye ri mata ipa ku ayamati wo siri te pa kanarazu aratame yo yo ki wo e te pa wasuru na to ipu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,8@能乎得天方莫忘止伊布,*

block.header: =N(" sikaru mono wo kuti ni ware pa kiywo si to ipi te kokoro ni kitana ki woba ame no opopa zu tuti no nose nu mono to nari nu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@然物乎口尔我方浄之止云天,*

block.header: =N(" ko wo tamotu i pa tatape wo ita si suturu i pa sosiri wo maneki tu ")

=N(" napo wa ga taputwo bwi woroga mi dokuzyu si matu ru saisyou waugyau no wau bopu syau ron bon ni nori tamapa ku mosi zen aku no gepu wo tukuru toki ni pa yo ku genzai no naka ni syoten mo tomo ni godi site so no zen aku no pou wo simyesu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-DAT,NP,2@最勝王経乃王法正論品尔命久,*

block.header: =N(" koku zin no aku gepu wo tukuru wo wau no sutete kinsei se zu ara mu i pa kore syauri ni jun se zu ")
=N(" dipin se mu koto masa ni nori no goto ku seyo to nori tamapi te ari ")
=N(" koko wo moti te imasi tati wo wosipe mitibi ku ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@是乎以天汝等乎教導久,*

block.header: =N(" ko no yo ni pa se ken no yau puku wo kagapu ri tadasi ku kiywo ki na wo arapa si noti no yo ni pa nin den no syau raku wo uke te tupi ni potoke to nare to omoposi te namo moro moro ni ko no koto wo wosipe tama pu to noritama pu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,0@今世尔方世間乃栄福乎蒙利,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,3@後世尔方人天乃勝楽乎受天,*

block.header: =N(" mata nori tamapa ku ko no tama pu obi wo tamapari te imasi tati no kokoro wo totonope napo si wa ga wosipe koto ni tagapa zu site tuka ne wosame mu sirusi to namo ko no obi wo tamapa ku to noritama pu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu ")
